etymology.description: semantic 水(水) (shuǐ, "water") + phonetic 隹(隹) (zhuī) -> Huai River
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 水(水) (shuǐ, "water") symbolizing a river, with 隹(隹) (zhuī), contributing the sound. This construction is used to denote the Huai River, specifically naming this geographic feature.

examples.chinese: 淮河是中国的一条重要河流(淮河是中國的一條重要河流)。
examples.pinyin: Huái hé shì Zhōngguó de yītiáo zhòngyào héliú.
examples.english: The Huai River is an important river in China.

examples.chinese: 每年夏季(每年夏季)，淮河流域常常发生洪水(淮河流域常常發生洪水)。
examples.pinyin: Měinián xiàjì, Huái hé liúyù chángcháng fāshēng hóngshuǐ.
examples.english: Every summer, floods often occur in the Huai River basin.

examples.chinese: 淮河的水质近年来有所改善(淮河的水質近年来有所改善)。
examples.pinyin: Huái hé de shuǐzhì jìnnián lái yǒusuǒ gǎishàn.
examples.english: The water quality of the Huai River has improved in recent years.
